summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LMG multi-page website. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend navigation, contact form integration, and responsive design mostly functional with minor dropdown navigation issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown navigation fails after first division click - ElementHandle becomes detached from DOM
Mobile menu About link not clickable - element not visible despite menu being open

passed_tests: Homepage hero section and divisions display
Main navigation links (Home, About, Services, Why LMG, Partners, Contact)
Mobile responsive layout and hamburger menu
Footer display with quick links and divisions
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dropdown navigation DOM attachment issue and mobile menu link visibility. Both are minor UI issues that don't affect core functionality.
